installer.welcome_d: An advanced autopilot for ETS2: lane keeping, adaptive cruise control, obstacle avoidance, map-based navigation, HUD and voice announcements. The wizard will guide you through installation step by step.
feats: Watches the road and keeps the truck in lane.
Holds speed and brakes for slower traffic.
Reacts to stops and obstacles ahead.
Drive the ETS2 world by coordinates.
Transparent overlay with the route and key stats.
Spoken speed, fuel and event updates.
Throttle smoothing for lower fuel use.
New versions pulled straight from GitHub.
installer.lic_accept: I have read and agree to the terms
installer.path_s: Choose where UltraPilot should be installed.
installer.disk_low: Low space ({} free) — at least 500 MB recommended
installer.disk_warn: ⚠ Folder is not empty — files will be overwritten.
installer.inst_s: Wait for the components to install.
installer.py_old: ✗ Python is too old ({ver}) — at least 3.10 is required.
installer.py_no_pip: ✗ Found Python has no pip — trying to install it.
installer.py_manual: ✗ Could not get Python — install it manually from https://python.org (check „Add Python to PATH“).
installer.src_try_raw: zip failed — downloading file by file…
installer.src_fail: ✗ Could not fetch files from GitHub (repo is private? try GITHUB_TOKEN).
installer.s_deps: Installing Python dependencies (may take a few minutes)…
installer.s_dll: Installing SCS plugins into the game…
installer.s_dll_none: Game not found yet — DLLs will be installed on first launch.
installer.lic_text:
ULTRAPILOT — LICENSE TERMS

1. PURPOSE. UltraPilot is a driver-assist tool intended solely for educational and entertainment purposes within the Euro Truck Simulator 2 video game. It is not intended for any real vehicle.

2. RESPONSIBLE USE. You bear full responsibility for supervising the software. The software may behave unpredictably. Never leave the autopilot unattended and always keep your hands on the wheel.

3. NO WARRANTY. The software is provided „as is", without any warranty — express or implied — including warranties of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose.

4. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY. The authors and contributors are not liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from the use of or inability to use this software.

5. THIRD-PARTY COMPONENTS. The installer may install drivers (ViGEmBus) and game SDK plugins subject to their own licenses. These components are not part of UltraPilot and their licenses apply independently.

6. COPYRIGHT. UltraPilot and its source code are protected by copyright. You may use, study, and modify it for personal use. Public redistribution of a modified version requires retaining the original authors.

7. UPDATES. UltraPilot may automatically connect to GitHub to check for and download updates. By this you agree that the application may download and run updated code from the matule123/ets2la repository.

8. DATA COLLECTION. UltraPilot does not collect personal data. Game telemetry (truck position, speed, plugin states) is processed locally on your computer and is never sent to any server.

9. DEPENDENCIES AND LIBRARIES. The application uses open-source libraries (PyQt6, PyOpenGL, numpy, opencv, psutil, requests, pyqtgraph, and others) which are subject to their own licenses (BSD, MIT, LGPL, etc.).

10. TERMINATION. You may terminate this license at any time by uninstalling the software. Termination does not affect the rights of third parties regarding their components.

11. GOVERNING LAW. These terms are governed by the applicable legislation of the country in which the software was installed.

12. CHANGES TO TERMS. The authors reserve the right to change these terms at any time. The current version is always available in the source code.

By installing UltraPilot, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to these terms.

onboarding.welcome_d: Let's set things up in a few quick steps: choose your language, install the game SDK and pick a map pack.
onboarding.lang_d: Slovak and English are bundled. Other languages can be downloaded — they show the percentage translated.
onboarding.sdk_d: UltraPilot detects your installed game(s) and copies the SDK plugin DLLs into the game folder so telemetry and control work.
onboarding.sdk_none: No ETS2 or ATS installation found. You can add the SDK manually later, or continue and it will be detected on first launch.
onboarding.sdk_uninstall_confirm: Remove the SDK files from this game?
onboarding.sdk_unsupported: Version {ver} is not bundled — please install the SDK manually from ETS2LA.
onboarding.map_d: Pick the map pack that matches your game and mods. It's downloaded once (~95 MB) and used for navigation.
onboarding.map_none: Could not load the map list. Check your internet connection and try again, or skip this step.
onboarding.done_d: UltraPilot is configured and ready to drive.
